name: Color of Romance
original_name: ももいろ あんずいろ さくらいろ
overview: One day, Anzu went to a drinking party with her best friend Yuka. Anzu got really drunk and saw a handsome man before she left in a hurry. However, fate appears when Anzu reunites with the handsome guy who is one of the two new employees in the company.

trailers.title: ドラマ＋「ももいろ あんずいろ さくらいろ」第２話PR動画！2月28日(日)よる11時55分ABCテレビ(関西)
